title: How I'd Learn AI From Scratch in 2026 (skip the useless 80%)
summary: Jeff Su presents a practical three-level roadmap for learning AI: selecting one model to go deep with, using contextual understanding over memorized prompting frameworks, and building connected AI systems. The guidance emphasizes skipping unnecessary 80% of content and focusing on context preservation tools and multi-model workflows.
writeup: Jeff Su lays out a three-level roadmap for learning AI from scratch: choosing one model to go deep with, prioritizing context management over memorizing prompting frameworks, and building AI systems with tools including AI coding. The framing argues that much of the conventional advice is inefficient and can be skipped in favor of practical workflows on modern LLMs. The takeaway is a sequenced path that moves from single-model fluency to context skills to system building.
